## Summary

A clear and short description of the feature request.

## Problem to solve

What problem does this solve for users or contributors?

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or approaches you have considered.

## Additional context

Add mockups, examples, references, or related discussions if available.
